name: Foot of the Castle
description: You stand beneath an old fortress wall in front of a sealed drawbridge across a moat. A nearby watchtower rises above the approach.
ambient: The wind moans through cracks in the battlements.
You hear chains clinking somewhere above.
A patch of slick moss glistens on the wall near the waterline.

north.blocked_text: Even if you swam across the moat there is nowhere to go.

interaction_rules.text: Your voice echoes off the stone, then dies. A few pebbles rattle down from the wall.
The water is murky and still. You see nothing but your own wavering reflection.
